name: MSSP - OS - MS - 16 - H - Disabled Account was Enabled
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event matches Event ID is any of 4722
when any of Account Name (custom) are contained in any of (Shared) MSSP - OS - MS - 01 - M - User Account Created - AlphaNumeric
when at least 1 events are seen with the same Account Name (custom) in 10 minutes
thresholds: when at least 1 events are seen with the same Account Name (custom) in 10 minutes
TD_list: APPLY MSSP - OS - MS - 16 - H - Disabled Account was Enabled on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event matches Event ID is any of 4722
AND NOT when any of Account Name (custom) are contained in any of (Shared) MSSP - OS - MS - 01 - M - User Account Created - AlphaNumeric
AND when at least 1 events are seen with the same Account Name (custom) in 10 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Disabled Account Was Enabled
